mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_device_group_rel(tenant_id, org_id, group_key, product_key, device_key, is_delete, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{orgId}, #{groupKey}, #{productKey}, #{deviceKey}, 0, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_device_group_rel SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE group_key = #{groupKey} AND is_delete = 0
UPDATE iot_device_group_rel SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM iot_device_group_rel WHERE group_key = #{groupKey} AND is_delete = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM iot_device_group_rel WHERE group_key = #{groupKey} AND is_delete = 0
